title: Bulbophyllum exquisitum

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a promising remedy for various ailments. taxonomy: Bulbophyllum exquisitum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Bulbophyllum. The classification of Bulbophyllum exquisitum places it within the subtribe Corymiinae and tribe Malaxideae.
